lua_scripts.increment: local val = redis.call('GET', KEYS[1]); val = tonumber(val) + ARGV[1]; redis.call('SET', KEYS[1], val); return val;
lua_scripts.get_stats: local visits = redis.call('GET', 'counter:visits'); local logins = redis.call('GET', 'counter:logins'); return visits .. '/' .. logins;

description: Analytics dashboard with Lua EVAL injection
